title: poa trivialis var. hohenackeri
intro: Poa trivialis var. hohenackeri, also known as the blue poa or Hohenacker's blue grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is a perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Poa trivialis var. hohenackeri include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
